Name: Breadhead
Aspect Skill:
Healthy Breakfast
Triggered after activating the Reality Synergy: Reality Anima have their Health increased by 320. Whenever a Daydreamer is defeated, the nearest non-Daydreamer opponent is immediately marked as a new Daydreamer. Additionally, Reality Anima launch a Butter Raid every 6s. Immediately launch a Butter Raid when a new Daydreamer appears on the field.

[Daydreamer]: A unit marked by the Reality Synergy, it will take bonus DMG from allied Reality Anima.
[Butter Raid]: Deals 200 Magic DMG to the Daydreamer with the lowest Health.
Eidos Skill:
Whole Wheat Bread
Launches 2 pieces of bread at the target. The first deals 400 Magic DMG and Stuns for 2s; the second applies 20% MR Shred to the target for 10s then deals 800 Magic DMG.
Companion Skill:
Mimoo Enhancement
Mimoo's Attack SPD increases by 20%.
When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Rich and Buttery
Enhances Healthy Breakfast: Immediately launches a Butter Raid whenever a new Daydreamer appears on the field.
Eidothread 2:
Dividing the Dough
Enhance Whole Wheat Bread: The second piece of bread will apply 20% MR Shred to the target for 10s.
Eidothread 3:
Second Proof
Enhances Healthy Breakfast: Butter Raid DMG increases to 300 (Resonance) Magic DMG.
Eidothread 4:
Punching Down and Shaping
Enhance Whole Wheat Bread: The DMG of the first piece of bread is increased to 500 (Focus); the DMG of the second piece of bread is increased to 1000 (Focus).
Eidothread 5:
Baking at High Heat
Enhance Healthy Breakfast: After Breadhead uses his Eidos Skill, each Reality Anima will launch Butter Raid once and generate 5 Energy for Breadhead.
Eidothread 6:
Plum Jam
Enhance Whole Wheat Bread, granting additional effects: Each time Whole Wheat Bread is used, Breadhead immediately regenerates 20 Eidos Energy. If Whole Wheat Bread defeats an opponent, Breadhead regenerates an additional 20 Eidos Energy and gains 10% Eidos Skill strength. This effect stacks.
Eidothread Terms: Butter Raid: Deals 200 (Resonance) Magic DMG to the Daydreamer with the lowest Health.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 8% MP after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 8% Attack SPD after entering battle.
ASV: Reality Anima prioritize attacking the Daydreamer that has taken DMG from Breadhead's Active Skill.
ASVI:
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% MP after entering battle.
ESV: Increases DMG dealt to Daydreamers by 20%.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 8% MP.
CSII: When Mimoo's Skill deals Skill DMG 9 times, Breadhead gains 1 stack of Momentum for 5s.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 8% Health.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% MP.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% Health.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% Attack SPD.

Name: Hua
Aspect Skill:
Lightning Run
After activating the Competition Synergy:
The ATK of Competition Anima increases by 45. After triggering the Competition Marker reward, Competition Anima gain 1 stack of Head Start. Additionally, whenever a Competition Anima participates in defeating an opponent, Competition Marker generates an extra 20 points, and grants 1 stack of Head Start to each participating Anima.

[Head Start]: Attack SPD increases by 15% until the end of battle. Max 5 stacks.
Eidos Skill:
Early Bird Gets the Worm
All allied Competition Anima gain Tempo. While Tempo is active, Basic Attacks deal 20 bonus Physical DMG.

[Tempo]: Gain an 60% Attack SPD bonus that decays over 4s.
Companion Skill:
Marshalbird Enhancement
Marshalbird regenerates 10% Energy when it participates in defeating an opponent. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Let's Go All Out!
Enhances Lightning Run: Whenever a Competition Anima participates in defeating an opponent, Competition Marker generates 20 (Resonance) additional points, and grants 1 stack of Head Start to each participant.
Eidothread 2:
Respect to a Worthy Opponent
Enhances Early Bird Gets the Worm: While Tempo is active, Basic Attacks deal 20 (Focus) bonus Physical DMG.
Eidothread 3:
I'm Not Waiting for You!
Enhances Lightning Run: At the start of battle, Competition Anima gain 1 stack of Head Start.
Eidothread 4:
Onward, to Victory!
Enhances Early Bird Gets the Worm: The Attack SPD bonus provided by Tempo is increased to 100% (Focus). The bonus Physical DMG for Basic Attacks while Tempo is active is increased to 30 (Focus).
Eidothread 5:
The Art of More for Less
Enhances Lightning Run: At the start of battle, Competition Marker gains an additional 20 Points; after each reward is triggered, it gains an additional 50 Points.
Eidothread 6:
Higher, Faster, Stronger!
Enhances Early Bird Gets the Worm: The Attack SPD increase from Tempo no longer decays. Hua regenerates 2.0 Eidos Energy/s when an Anima on the field is affected by Tempo.
Eidothread Terms:
Head Start: Attack SPD increases by 15% until the end of battle. Max 5 stacks.

Tempo: Gain an 80% (Focus) Attack SPD bonus that decays over 4s.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 8% Attack SPD after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 8% Health after entering battle.
ASV: After the start of battle, all Anima enter Dash for 10s.
ASVI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 15% Attack SPD after entering battle.
ESV: While in the Tempo state, Movement SPD increases by 30%.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% ATK.
CSII: Hua regenerates 10 Eidos Energy when Marshalbird participates in defeating an opponent.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 8% Health.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 12% ATK.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 12% Attack SPD.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% ATK.

Name: Maple
Aspect Skill:
Spooked
After activating the Joy Synergy:
When an allied unit in the Ecstasy state deals DMG to an opponent, apply 1 stack of Lingering Dread to the target. When Lingering Dread reaches 10 stacks, consume all stacks and deal 200 Magic DMG. The first time 4 Anima on the field enter Ecstasy or Bright Idea, all allied units gain the Ecstasy state.

[Ecstasy]: Regenerate 3 Energy/s. Gain an Attack SPD bonus that does not stack based on the number of Joy Anima deployed during the Preparation Phase.
[Lingering Dread]: Attack SPD is reduced by 1%, max 10 stacks.
[Bright Idea]: MP increases, Attack SPD increases.
Eidos Skill:
Pint-Size Prank
Designate an allied unit, who gains Bright Idea for 10s.

[Bright Idea]: MP increases by 25%, Attack SPD increases by 10%.
Companion Skill:
Pumpkimp Enhancement
Pumpkimp's Attack SPD increases by 16%. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
"Hiya everyone! Welcome to my playground~"
Enhances Spooked to grant an additional effect: The first time 4 Anima on the field enter Ecstasy or Bright Idea, all allied units gain the Ecstasy state.
Eidothread 2:
"C'mon over, I promise it'll be fun~"
Enhances Pint-Size Prank: When an Anima with Bright Idea participates in defeating an opponent, the nearest allied unit becomes a Troublemaker for the next 5s.
Eidothread 3:
"Boom! Hehehe — Gotcha! You totally jumped~"
Enhances Spooked: The Magic DMG dealt by consuming Lingering Dread is increased to 250 (Resonance). The Attack SPD reduction caused by Lingering Dread increases to 2%.
Eidothread 4:
"Ta-daa! Just like how I pictured it!"
Enhances Pint-Size Prank: The MP bonus and Attack SPD bonus provided by Bright Idea are increased to 30% and 13% respectively.
Eidothread 5:
"Nope, no Maple here~ I'm a gift tree~"
Enhances Spooked: When stacks of Lingering Dread are consumed to deal DMG, the number of stacks is reduced to 8.
Eidothread 6:
"Your face needs to get... way more interesting!"
Enhances Pint-Size Prank: The Basic Attacks of Anima with Bright Idea and Troublemakers deal 25 (Focus) bonus Magic DMG after hitting.
Eidothread Terms:
Ecstasy: Regenerate 3 Energy/s. Gain an Attack SPD bonus that does not stack based on the number of Joy Anima deployed during the Preparation Phase.

Bright Idea: MP increases by 25%, Attack SPD increases by 10%.

Troublemaker: MP increases by 25%, Attack SPD increases by 10%.

Lingering Dread: Attack SPD is reduced by 2%, max 10 stacks.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 8% MP after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 8% Health after entering battle.
ASV: The first time Lingering Dread deals DMG, Maple regenerates 40 Energy.
ASVI:
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% MP after entering battle.
ESV: During the duration of Bright Idea and Troublemaker, Anima regenerate 2 Energy/s.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 8% MP.
CSII: Pumpkimp's Basic Attacks generate 2 Energy. During Bright Idea, Basic Attacks regenerate 2 additional Energy.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 8% Health.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 12% MP.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 12% Attack SPD.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% MP.

Name: Kiana
Aspect Skill:
Celestial Ranger
After activating the Strength Synergy:
The Max Health of Strength Anima increases by 330, and each Follower gains an additional 270 Max Health. At the start of battle, each Follower gains 2 stacks of Entropy. Whenever a Follower takes DMG equal to at least 10% of their Max Health, the Dominator gains 1 stack of Entropy, max 10 stacks. When the Dominator participates in defeating an enemy Anima, the Dominator and all Followers recover 240 Health.

[Followers]: Strength Anima other than the Dominator.
[Entropy]: Increases ATK and Attack SPD by 4.5% each.
[Dominator]: The strongest Strength Anima. Gains Worship Bonus from Followers.
Eidos Skill:
Written in the Stars
Select 1 allied Anima, granting them the Destiny effect and a Shield equal to 25% of their own Max Health.

[Destiny]: Increases Max Health by 1080 and ATK by 80 for 16s.
Companion Skill:
Fyrklor Enhancement
Gains a Shield equal to 10% at the start of battle, triggering again when Health reaches 50% for the first time. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.

"I'm Not Running Away Anymore!"

"Let's Go Get Some Sweet Pepper Curry!"

"Careful Playing with Fire, Okay~!"
Enhances Celestial Ranger: Gain 10% Physical Leech at max Entropy stacks.

"I Wonder What's On the Moon?"
Enhances Written in the Stars: Refreshes the duration of Destiny each time participating in defeating an opponent.

Name: Herocrates

On the Sacred Disease

The ATK of Memory Anima is increased by 40. After Echo deals DMG, mark the targeted opponent with Crisis.

Herocratic Oath

Each time the Anima deals CRIT DMG during Follow-Up Visit, it restores 150 Health for itself and generates 15 Eidos Energy for Herocrates. This effect can trigger at most 3 times.

Treatment Regimen: Skills can Critically Hit. CRIT Rate increases by 35%, and CRIT DMG increases by 15%.

Night Chills Under the Frost Moon

The MP of Reality Anima increases by 45. Whenever a Reality Anima deals DMG to a Daydreamer, it gains 1 stack of Frost. If the target is Frozen or Frostbitten, gain 1 additional stack.

[Frost]: Every 4 stacks increases MP by 15, max 20 stacks.
[Frostbite]: A state caused by Bai Mei's Eidos Skill. When removed, deals Magic DMG to the bearer. DMG increases with stacks.
Eidos Skill:
Flurries at Daybreak
Applies 4s of Freeze to all opponents within 3 hexes. For the next 4s, opponents hit gain 1 stack of Frostbite whenever they take any DMG. Removes all Frostbite stacks after 4s, dealing (100+20 x Frostbite stacks) Magic DMG.
Companion Skill:
Seroplumanth Enhancement
Gain immunity to Control Effects while the Skill is active. Decreases the Active Skill's hit interval to once every 0.2s. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Jin Valley Gardens, Splendor at Every Turn
Enhance Night Chills Under the Frost Moon: If a Reality Anima reaches the maximum number of Frost stacks, they enter the Frostbranded state.
Eidothread 2:
No Faith Lightly Forsworn, With Inmost Heart and Eyes Entire
Enhances Flurries at Daybreak: If a unit has 20 or more Frostbite stacks, they take 200 (Focus) bonus True DMG.
Eidothread 3:
Moreover the Beauty, Light as Feiyan Dancing in the Palm
Enhances Night Chills Under the Frost Moon: The MP bonus from every 4 stacks of Frost increases to 25 (Resonance).
Eidothread 4:
The Year's Glories, Taken as They Come
Enhances Flurries at Daybreak: Base DMG dealt upon removing Frostbite increases to (150+40 (Focus) x Frostbite stacks), and bonus DMG increases to 250 (Focus).
Eidothread 5:
This Floating Life, Reckoned in a Breath
Enhance Night Chills Under the Frost Moon: When a Reality Anima enters the Frostbranded state, it will regenerate 40 Energy for itself and 30 Eidos Energy for Bai Mei.
Eidothread 6:
Rain of Regret, Clouds of Sorrow; Earth Remote, Heaven Far
Enhance Flurries at Daybreak: Each stack of Frostbite will carry a Vulnerability effect of 1%. If DMG dealt by Frostbite defeats a Daydreamer, Bai Mei gains 70 Eidos Energy.
Eidothread Terms:
Frost: Every 4 stacks increases MP by 15 (Resonance), max 20 stacks.

Frostbranded: After dealing DMG to a target, mark it as a Daydreamer.

Frostbite: A state caused by Bai Mei's Eidos Skill. When removed, deals Magic DMG to the bearer. DMG increases with stacks.

Daydreamer: A unit marked by Reality Aspect Synergy, it will take bonus DMG from allied Reality Anima.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% MP after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
ASV: If a Daydreamer is Frozen, the bonus DMG ratio granted to Reality Anima by the Reality Synergy increases by an additional 50%.
ASVI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 20% Attack SPD after entering battle.
ESV: After an opponent is hit by Flurries at Daybreak for the first time, it gains 3 additional stacks of Frostbite, while Daydreamers gain 6 stacks.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% MP.
CSII: When Seroplumanth's Skill hits 16 times, Bai Mei gains 1 stack of Momentum for 5s.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% Health.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% MP.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% MP.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 2 Energy regen/s.

Name: Olympia
Aspect Skill:
Veil
Dark Anima gain 90 ATK and 1 stack of Shadow Breath. Anima in Umbral Shrouds gain 20 initial Energy.

[Shadow Breath]: Each stack reduces an Anima's max Energy Costs by 3. Max 4 stacks.
[Umbral Shroud]: A special hex created by the Dark Aspect Synergy. After the start of battle, the Attack SPD of allied units on this hex increases.
Eidos Skill:
Confession
Deals 50+6 + 120 Physical DMG to all enemy Anima within 3 hexes and applies Night Rend to targets hit.

[Night Rend]: Applies 20% Armor Shred, and increases DMG taken from Dark Anima by 25% for 6s. Duration can be refreshed.
Companion Skill:
Noctumbra Enhancement
When an enemy unit is concurrently affected by Lingering Shade and Night Rend, increase DMG taken from Noctumbra by 30%. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Borrowed Blade
Enhances Veil: Shadow Breath grants an additional 20 (Resonance) ATK.
Eidothread 2:
Under False Colors
Enhances "Confession": After the Skill hits, applies 1 stack of Lingering Shade each to the opponents with the highest and lowest current Health.
Eidothread 3:
Paper Tiger
Enhances Veil: Initial Shadow Breath stacks increased to 2. Dark Anima gain 1 extra stack for every 4 times they use their Active Skills.
Eidothread 4:
Turn the Tables
Enhances Confession: Skill DMG increases to 75 (Focus) x5 + 180 (Focus) Physical DMG.
Eidothread 5:
Scapegoat
Enhances Veil: Buffs Shadow Breath: Each stack reduces the max Energy Cost by 4 and increases ATK by 30 (Resonance), stacking up to 6 times.
Eidothread 6:
Slip the Noose
Enhances "Confession": The effect of Night Rend is enhanced: Lasts 12s (refreshable). When hit by a Dark Anima's attack, the target receives 1 stack of Lingering Shade, max 6 stacks.
Eidothread Terms:
Shadow Breath: Each stack reduces an Anima's max Energy Costs by 3 and increases ATK by 20 (Resonance). Max 4 stacks.

Lingering Shade: When Noctumbra's Active Skill hits an opponent with Lingering Shade, it deals Physical DMG and removes the effect.

Night Rend: Applies 20% Armor Shred, and DMG dealt by Dark Anima to the target increases by 25% for 12s (refreshable). When hit by a Dark Anima's attack, the target receives 1 stack of Lingering Shade, max 6 stacks.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% ATK after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
ASV: When Dark Anima deal DMG to an opponent in the Night Rend state, they heal for 20% of the DMG dealt.
ASVI:
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 12% Health after entering battle.
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 12% ATK after entering battle.
ESV: Eidos Skill hits apply 30% Deep Wounds to the target for 10s.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% ATK.
CSII: Whenever Noctumbra applies or consumes Lingering Shade, Olympia gains 1 stack of Momentum for 5s.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% Attack SPD.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% Health.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% ATK.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 18% Physical Leech.

Name: Hungrille
Aspect Skill:
None Shall Hunger in the Age of Plenty
After activating the Satiation Synergy:
The Satiation Synergy's healing effect expands to include all allied Anima. When receiving healing, Satiation Anima gain 1 stack of Sated, max 5 stacks. They additionally gain the Gorged state until the end of battle after reaching max stacks.

[Sated]: Increases Max Health by 120.
[Gorged]: Increases Size by 20% and Max Health by 20%.
Eidos Skill:
No Stopping the Night Banquet
All allied units are invited to the Court's Night Banquet, gaining Afterglow when it ends.

[Court's Night Banquet]: For 4s, all allied units' Max Health increases by 750 and their Health cannot drop below 200. DMG opponents would theoretically deal is recorded as Bloodfeast.
[Afterglow]: Gain a Shield equal to 30% of Bloodfeast, lasts 10s.
Companion Skill:
Hoggit Enhancement
Gains 1% Max Health for each hex traveled through movement or displacement. Up to 30% can be gained from this effect. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Softly Intoxicating Milk Beer Aperitif
Enhances None Shall Hunger in the Age of Plenty, granting an additional effect: Each time a Satiation Anima becomes Gorged, all Satiation Anima gain 15 (Resonance) MP.
Eidothread 2:
Rich Velvety Cream Soup
Enhances No Stopping the Night Banquet: For the duration of Afterglow, Anima gain 20% DMG reduction and 25% incoming Heal Amp.
Eidothread 3:
Dazzling Assortment of Cheeses
Enhances None Shall Hunger in the Age of Plenty: Satiation Anima immediately gain 1 stack of Sated at the start of battle. Max Sated stacks increased to 6.
Eidothread 4:
Amber-Glazed Creme Caramel
Enhances No Stopping the Night Banquet: Afterglow's Heal Amp increases to 50%.
Eidothread 5:
Silken Mille-Crepe Cake
Enhances None Shall Hunger in the Age of Plenty: The Gorge effect is enhanced: Increases size by 40% and Max Health by 40%.
Eidothread 6:
Black Tea Digestif with a Lingering Finish
Enhances No Stopping the Night Banquet, granting an additional effect: Restores 400 (Focus) total Health during Court's Night Banquet.
Eidothread Terms:
Gorged: Increases Size by 20% and Max Health by 20%.

Afterglow: Gain a Shield equal to 30% of Bloodfeast, lasts 10s.

Sated: Increases Max Health by 120 (Resonance).

Court's Night Banquet: For 4s, all allied units' Max Health increases by 750 (Focus) and their Health cannot drop below 200. DMG opponents would theoretically deal is recorded as Bloodfeast.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% MP after entering battle.
ASV: Anima with Sated gain 10% DMG reduction; Anima with Gorged gain 20% DMG reduction.
ASVI:
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 12% Health after entering battle.
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 12% MP after entering battle.
ESV: For the duration of Court's Night Banquet, when allied units receive healing, the healing amount is recorded as Bloodfeast.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% MP.
CSII: Gains 1% Max Health for each hex traveled through movement or displacement. Up to 30% can be gained from this effect.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% Health.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% MP.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% Health.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 18% Magic Leech.

Name: Parayaya
Aspect Skill:
A Scarlet Slash in the Dark
Increases Hate Anima Health by 1200. For every 4 stacks of Rancor, gain 1 stack of Vengeance. Anima with Vengeance restore 250 Health whenever their Rancor stacks increase.

[Rancor]: Hate Aspect Synergy effect. When an allied Anima is defeated, Hate Anima accumulate Rancor, gaining an ATK Bonus.
[Vengeance]: Hate Anima deal 15% bonus DMG to opponents that have dealt DMG to them, stacking up to 5 times.
Eidos Skill:
A Touch of Boredom Amid the Chaos
Select a target opponent, turning them into a Puppet of Love. Allied Hate Anima recover 40 Health when hitting a Puppet of Love.

[Puppet of Love]: Changes allegiance, ATK and MP are reduced by 30%-10% for 5s.
Companion Skill:
Mesmerith Enhancement
Mesmerith's Basic Attacks regenerate an additional 2 Energy, and its Skill will prioritize units Beguiled by Parayaya as targets. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Sing With Me Once More, Our Twisted Harmony
Enhances A Scarlet Slash in the Dark: Vengeance effect enhanced: Hate Anima restore 1.0 Energy/s.
Eidothread 2:
A Vow to Share, This Love Given to This Life
Enhances A Touch of Boredom Amid the Chaos: After Puppet of Love ends, the unit takes 25% increased DMG until the end of battle.
Eidothread 3:
If I am a Phantom, the World's Hatred Made Me So
Enhances A Scarlet Slash in the Dark: Bonus DMG dealt by Anima in the Vengeance state against opponents who damaged them increases to 20%. When Rancor stacks increase, base Health restored increases to 450 (Resonance).
Eidothread 4:
That Voice in Sleep, That Shade in Dreams
Enhances A Touch of Boredom Amid the Chaos: Base Health recovery when Hate Anima hit a Puppet of Love increases to 80 (Focus). The base ATK and MP reduction for the Puppet of Love becomes 20%-10% (Focus).
Eidothread 5:
Grieve for the One in Shadow, What Sorrows Has This Life Known?
Enhances A Scarlet Slash in the Dark: Vengeance effect enhanced: Hate Anima regenerate 2.0 Energy/s and deals 25% additional DMG to opponents who have dealt DMG to them, stacking up to 5 times.
Eidothread 6:
The Nocturne Fades to Silence, a Lonely Note Remains
Enhance A Touch of Boredom Amid the Chaos, granting an additional effect: Upon applying the effect, if the target is in the back two rows of the enemy side of the battlefield, immediately regenerates all Energy; otherwise, the target loses 5% Health per second.
Eidothread Terms:
Vengeance: Hate Anima regenerate 1.0 Energy/s and deals 15% bonus DMG to opponents that have damaged them, stacking up to 5 times.

Puppet of Love: Changes allegiance, ATK and MP are reduced by 30%-10% (Focus) for 4s.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% ATK after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
ASV: When an Anima has max Vengeance stacks, their Basic Attacks deal additional Physical DMG equal to Rancor stacks ×5.
ASVI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 20% Attack SPD after entering battle.
ESV: Enemy units within 1 hex of a Puppet of Love have their Armor reduced by 25%.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% Attack SPD.
CSII: Mesmerith's Basic Attacks regenerate an additional 2 Energy, and its Skill will prioritize units Beguiled by Parayaya as targets.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% ATK.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% Health.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% ATK.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima's DMG bonus increases by 14%.

Name: Blade
Aspect Skill:
Through the Valley of Wandering Souls
After activating the Strength Synergy:
Strength Anima ATK increases by 40. After the Dominator deals DMG, inflicts Splinter on the target. Additionally, different effects are provided based on the number of Strength Anima deployed:
- Only 1 deployed: The Dominator gains Steelforged.
- More than 1 deployed: All Followers gain the same ratio of Light of the Strong as the Dominator.

[Splinter]: DMG taken from the Dominator increases by 20%.
[Steelforged]: Max Health and ATK increase by 20%.
[Light of the Strong]: Stat bonuses provided by the Strength Synergy based on Anima Traits.
Eidos Skill:
Thus, the Mourning Dew
Summons a Splintered Sword to attack 1 enemy unit, dealing 1800 Physical DMG and applying 20% Armor Shred for 15s.
Companion Skill:
Bladehound Enhancement
Bladehound ignores 35% of the target's Armor when dealing DMG to targets that have taken DMG from Blade. When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are deployed together, the Anima Companion gains an exclusive special effect.
Eidothread 1:
Moths Dance in Guttering Ghostlight
Enhances Through the Valley of Wandering Souls, granting additional effects: When only 1 Strength Anima is deployed, after any allied unit deals Physical DMG, the Dominator is healed for 20% of the DMG dealt. When more than 1 Strength Anima is deployed, after Strength Anima deal DMG to opponents with Splinter status, they are healed for 10% of the DMG dealt.
Eidothread 2:
Frost-edged Blade of Hundredforged Steel
Enhance Thus, the Mourning Dew, granting an additional effect: When used, if the target's Health is below 50%, then deal one instance of 400 (Focus) bonus Physical DMG; when at 50% Health or above, Armor Shred increases to 30%.
Eidothread 3:
The Old Cannot Die, the Young Do Not Weep
Enhances Through the Valley of Wandering Souls: The DMG units marked with Splinter receive from the Dominator increases to 40%.
Eidothread 4:
Crimson Blossoms Fall, Bones Moulder in Barren Wastes
Enhance Thus, the Mourning Dew: When the target's Health is below 50%, the bonus Physical DMG increases to 800 (Focus); when at 50% Health or above, Armor Shred increases to 40% and lasts until the end of battle.
Eidothread 5:
The Lone Soul Sleeps in Coffin's Keeping
Enhances Through the Valley of Wandering Souls: When only 1 Strength Anima is deployed, the Dominator gains 2 stacks of Adamant. If more than 1 Strength Anima is deployed, all Strength Anima gain 1 stack of Adamant.
Eidothread 6:
The Old Home Stands, Yet Witnesses No Return
Enhance Thus, the Mourning Dew: Gain an additional effect: If this Skill defeats the target, Blade regenerates 50 Eidos Energy.
Eidothread Terms:
Splinter: DMG taken from the Dominator increases by 20%.

Adamant: Gain 15% DMG reduction. Can stack.
ASI: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% Health after entering battle.
ASIII: When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 10% ATK after entering battle.
ASV: Blade's Eidos Skill deals DMG, inflict Splinter on the target.
ASVI:
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 12% Health after entering battle.
When the Eidos is deployed, Anima of the same Aspect gain 12% ATK after entering battle.
ESV: When the Dominator or Blade's Eidos Skill defeats an opponent marked with Splinter, Active Skill DMG increases by 5%. Can be increased by up to 50% this way.
CSI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% Health.
CSII: When Bladehound's Active Skill inflicts Stun, Blade gains 1 stack of Momentum for 5s.
CSIII: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 10% ATK.
CSIV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% Health.
CSV: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 15% ATK.
CSVI: When the Eidos and their Anima Companion are both deployed, the Anima gains 18% Physical Leech.
